golden_provenance.publisher: Bidiphar (Cong ty CP Duoc - Trang thiet bi Y te Binh Dinh)
source_documents_used: BCTC hop nhat nam 2025 sau kiem toan (Bidiphar)
Tai lieu / tin DHDCD 2026 Bidiphar (co tuc tien mat 20%, so co phieu luu hanh)
golden_provenance.notes: Official audited 2025FY figures injected to fix audit items NUMERIC-02 (selling vs admin expense split: SG&A = 418.308 + 139.794 = 558.102), NUMERIC-04 (net debt bridge: long_term_debt 132.0 + short_term_investments 409.201 -> net debt approx -436.77), NUMERIC-01/DATA-03 (shares_outstanding ~94.4m and cash dividend 2,000 VND/cp). Values in VND billion unless unit states otherwise (shares in absolute count; dividend in VND/share). Only 2025FY is injected here: the audit verified the official 2025 split and balance-sheet components; 2021-2024 admin-expense / long-term-debt / short-term-investments official breakdown was NOT independently verified and remains from the provider (vnstock/VCI) pending official sourcing. equity.parent 2025 carried at provider value (confidence 0.85) pending exact audited figure. Q1/2026, 2026 management guidance (revenue 2,090 / PBT 375), private placement (23.3m) and ESOP (1.5m) are NOT canonical FY facts and are deliberately excluded per FY-only scope; they belong to ManagementGuidance / CorporateAction artifacts (follow-up).
